chunks.text: Technical Reports - Michael A. Harrison. User Interface Management System Embedded in a Multimedia Document Editor Framework (CSD-93-773) by Takashi Ohtsu and Michael A. Harrison. Defining Hypermedia: The Essential Elements (CSD-92-671) by Michael A. Harrison. A Debugger for the Post Script Language (CSD-91-628) by Michael A. Harrison and Fred Meyer. INCTEX: An Incremental Document Processing System (CSD-91-614) by Michael A. Harrison and Derluen Pan. Numbering Document Components (CSD-90-568) by Michael A. Harrison and Ethan V. Munson.
chunks.question: What are some technical reports by Michael A. Harrison from 1989 to 1993?
chunks.answer: Reports on hypermedia, debugging, and document processing.

chunks.text: On Integrated Bibliography Processing (CSD-89-517) by Michael A. Harrison and Ethan V. Munson. Multiple Representation Document Development (CSD-87-367) by Pehong Chen and Michael A. Harrison. Integrating Noninteractive Document Processors into an Interactive Environment (CSD-87-349) by Pehong Chen and Michael A. Harrison. Automating Index Preparation (CSD-87-347) by Pehong Chen and Michael A. Harrison. Iteration Theorems for Deterministic Families of Languages (CSD-86-271) by Michael A. Harrison. Theoretical Issues Concerning Protection in Operating Systems (CSD-84-170) by Michael A. Harrison.
chunks.question: What topics do Michael A. Harrison's earlier technical reports cover?
chunks.answer: Bibliography, document development, and theoretical issues.
